title: Shatapatha Brahmana XI: Indra Slays Vritra
description: Shatapatha Brahmana XI — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.
introduction: Shatapatha Brahmana XI — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.

translation.text: Indra was the slayer of Vritra. The waters were held back. The sun did not shine. Indra took the thunderbolt. He struck Vritra. The waters were released. The sun shone again. The world was renewed.
